svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Vue2转Vue3 codemod 事务化流程" id="vue2CodemodTx1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-147" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="事务化主流程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="820" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="安全网（旁挂）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="300" x="860" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Plan 计划
算出所有 change 入队" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="200" x="60" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="ChangeQueue
依赖升级 / 脚本迁移 / vite 脚手架
AST codemod / 类型生成" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="260" x="60" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="预检有冲突?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="140" x="380" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pabort" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="❌ 中止 · 一个字不写
报告标出冲突项" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="380" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Apply 执行
预检过才落盘
任一步失败即停" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="200" x="600" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Restore 还原
（从备份 zip 还原）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="600" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ok" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="迁移报告 migration-report.md
依赖变化 / 改了哪些文件 / 需人工确认的 note" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="600" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="备份 zip
感知 .gitignore，不带 node_modules" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="890" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="--dry-run 试跑
跑完不写盘，输出 change 清单 + skip 项" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="890" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="restore 前
再打一次还原前备份" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="890" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3yes" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p4" value="否"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3no" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pabort" value="是"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4fail" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p5" value="失败"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4ok" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ok" value="成功"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="es1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p4" value="执行前"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="es2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p4" value="入队后可选"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="es3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p5" value="还原时"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
